description_long: This is a stone memorial obelisk with a rounded arch top, flanked by two cylindrical columns and set on a rectangular stone base. The front features a carved shell motif above an inscribed plaque, framed by pinkish granite and gray stone. Four vertical red metal rods rise from the corners of the base, possibly serving as protective barriers or supports. The rear of the obelisk is rough and unfinished, with visible weathering and a central cavity or damage. The base is constructed from a mix of stone and brick, with a black plaque or plate at the front. The overall appearance suggests a historical or commemorative function, likely found in an urban park or cemetery.
description: A stone memorial obelisk with a rounded arch, inscribed plaque, and four red metal rods on a rectangular base. Features decorative columns and a shell motif above the inscription.
description_view_0: Front view shows the arched top, shell motif, inscribed plaque, two columns, and four red rods rising from the corners.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the depth of the structure, the thickness of the stone, and the alignment of the red rods.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the rough, unfinished stone surface with a central cavity and no visible inscription or decoration.
description_view_3: Right side view highlights the layered stone construction, the side profile of the columns, and the red rods.
attribute_inscription: There is an inscription on the front plaque, set beneath the shell motif and between the columns. The text is engraved in English, with a serif font, but is partially weathered and difficult to read in detail.
attribute_ornamentation: A carved shell motif is present above the inscription on the front, and the arch and columns are decorative. No other ornamentation is visible.
attribute_base_design: The base is rectangular, constructed from stone and brick, with a black plaque or plate at the front. The base is slightly raised and supports the columns and arch structure.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is a rounded arch, finished in pinkish granite, with no additional decoration or pointed features.
attribute_surrounding_features: Four vertical red metal rods are positioned at the corners of the base, likely serving as protective barriers. No other surrounding features are visible.
